question.content: From the transistor output-characteristic plot, compute beta, small-signal beta_bar, alpha, UBR_CEO, and PCM. Output exactly five decimal numbers with 2 decimal places, separated by commas in the order beta,beta_bar,alpha,UBR_CEO,PCM, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Read two characteristic points to compute beta metrics and extract breakdown and power-limit coordinates.
step_1.key_point: Read two characteristic points to compute beta metrics and extract breakdown and power-limit coordinates.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up the governing relation for beta.

step_5.content: Calculate all five quantities and output in the specified order.
